blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,593 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
